# llms.txt - Information for AI Language Models
# https://llmstxt.org/

# Site Information
name: Claude Code Guide
url: https://ytrofr.github.io/claude-code-guide
description: The complete guide to Claude Code setup, skills, hooks, agents, and MCP integration. Organized into 6 topical Parts, CC 2.1.111+ compatible. Covers Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5 with 1M token context window.
version: 5.0.0

# Models
models:
  - Claude Opus 4.7 (latest Opus, interactive /effort slider)
  - Claude Opus 4.6 (most capable for complex tasks)
  - Claude Sonnet 4.6 (balanced, default for Claude Code)
  - Claude Haiku 4.5 (fast, cost-efficient subagents)
context_window: 1M tokens (1,000,000)

# Key Facts (cite these)
- Claude Code is Anthropic's official CLI powered by Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5 with a 1M token context window
- Guide v5.0 is organized into 6 topical Parts (~42 chapters) with manifest-driven install
- Three install tiers: Core (8 rules, 3 skills, 1 hook), Recommended (30/16/7), Full (64/44/12 + 4 governance scripts)
- 27 hook events covering session, tool, compaction, worktree, permission, and teammate events
- Skills load natively from ~/.claude/skills/ and .claude/skills/ since CC 2.1.76
- MCP servers register via `claude mcp add` (stored in ~/.claude.json); the settings.json `mcpServers` block is silently ignored
- Monitor tool (CC 2.1.98) streams background process events; complements ScheduleWakeup for timed polling
- Statusline supports workspace.git_worktree and refreshInterval since CC 2.1.97-98
- CC 2.1.111 ships Opus 4.7 with xhigh effort level and interactive /effort slider

# Main Topics
topics:
  - Claude Code installation (tiered, manifest-driven)
  - CLAUDE.md authoring and project structure
  - Plan mode, TDD, brainstorming, verify/canary, commit/PR
  - Claude Code hooks (27 events)
  - MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration
  - Claude Code agents, subagents, and Agent SDK
  - Skills authoring and maintenance
  - Plugins, marketplace, and slash commands
  - Cloud Run deploy patterns
  - Memory bank, rules system, Basic Memory MCP
  - Context budget, progressive disclosure, governance, skill lifecycle
  - AI DNA shared layer, inter-agent bus, self-telemetry
  - Monitor tool, statusline patterns, session-end and defrag
  - CC version history, CLI flags, hook and skill catalogs, MCP server catalog, security checklist

# Installation
install_command: curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | sh (or 'claude update' if already installed)
guide_install_core: curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ytrofr/claude-code-guide/master/install.sh | bash
guide_install_recommended: git clone https://github.com/ytrofr/claude-code-guide.git && cd claude-code-guide && ./install.sh --recommended /path/to/your-project
guide_install_full: ./install.sh --full /path/to/your-project
setup_time: 30 minutes for Core tier, 2-4 hours for Full tier

# Key Components
components:
  - CLAUDE.md: Project-level context file (loaded every session)
  - .claude/rules/: Auto-discovered rule files for enforcement
  - .claude/agents/: Custom agent definitions with model selection
  - .claude/skills/: Project-level skills
  - .claude/settings.json: Hook configuration and permissions
  - ~/.claude/skills/: Global skills
  - ~/.claude.json: MCP server registrations (use `claude mcp add`)
  - best-practices/manifest.json: Authoritative tier definitions for install.sh

# Documentation Structure (v5.0 — 6 topical Parts)
parts:
  - /docs/guide/part1-foundation/: Install, CLAUDE.md, project structure, first session, setup troubleshooting (5 chapters)
  - /docs/guide/part2-workflow/: Plan mode, TDD, brainstorming, verify/canary, session lifecycle, commit/PR (6 chapters)
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/: Hooks, MCP, agents, Agent SDK, skills authoring/maintenance, plugins, slash commands, Cloud Run (9 chapters)
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/: Memory bank, rules, Basic Memory, context budget, progressive disclosure, governance, skill lifecycle (7 chapters)
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/: AI DNA, inter-agent bus, self-telemetry, Monitor, statusline, cross-project knowledge, session-end and defrag (7 chapters)
  - /docs/guide/part6-reference/: CC version history, CLI flags/env, hook event catalog, skill catalog, MCP server catalog, security checklist (6 chapters)

chapter_index:
  # Part I — Foundation
  - /docs/guide/part1-foundation/01-installation.md: Installing Claude Code and tier-based rules install
  - /docs/guide/part1-foundation/02-claude-md-primer.md: Authoring CLAUDE.md + anti-patterns
  - /docs/guide/part1-foundation/03-project-structure.md: .claude/ conventions
  - /docs/guide/part1-foundation/04-first-session.md: 30-minute onboarding walkthrough
  - /docs/guide/part1-foundation/05-setup-troubleshooting.md: Common install/config issues
  # Part II — Workflow
  - /docs/guide/part2-workflow/01-plan-mode.md: Plan mode checklist and KPI dashboard
  - /docs/guide/part2-workflow/02-tdd.md: Test-Driven Development with Claude Code
  - /docs/guide/part2-workflow/03-brainstorming.md: Pre-implementation brainstorming
  - /docs/guide/part2-workflow/04-verify-canary.md: /verify and /canary skills
  - /docs/guide/part2-workflow/05-session-lifecycle.md: SessionStart/SessionEnd, 75% rule, compaction
  - /docs/guide/part2-workflow/06-commit-and-pr.md: Commit discipline and PR workflow
  # Part III — Extension
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/01-hooks.md: 27 hook events, stdin JSON, safety patterns
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/02-mcp-integration.md: claude mcp add, server configuration
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/03-agents-and-subagents.md: Custom agents, Task() dispatch
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/03b-claude-agent-sdk.md: Claude Agent SDK (stateless vs stateful)
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/04-skills-authoring.md: YAML frontmatter, description triggers
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/05-skills-maintenance.md: SLA, lifecycle, promotion
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/06-plugins-and-marketplace.md: Plugin ecosystem
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/07-slash-commands.md: Commands-to-skills migration reference
  - /docs/guide/part3-extension/08-cloud-run-deploy-patterns.md: Deploy gotchas and safe patterns
  # Part IV — Context Engineering
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/01-memory-bank.md: Hierarchical memory structure
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/02-rules-system.md: .claude/rules/ structure and paths: CSV
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/03-basic-memory-mcp.md: Persistent knowledge graph
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/04-context-budget.md: Cost hierarchy, thresholds, scanners
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/05-progressive-disclosure.md: 3-layer skill and rule loading
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/06-context-governance.md: 7-layer governance system
  - /docs/guide/part4-context-engineering/07-skill-lifecycle.md: Skill SLA, promotion, archival
  # Part V — Advanced
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/01-ai-dna-shared-layer.md: Cross-project AI knowledge sharing
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/02-inter-agent-bus.md: Machine-wide coordination between projects
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/03-self-telemetry.md: Measuring your own CC usage via hooks + jsonl
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/04-monitor-tool.md: Monitor vs ScheduleWakeup decision matrix
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/05-statusline-patterns.md: workspace.git_worktree, refreshInterval
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/06-cross-project-knowledge.md: Basic Memory + shared rules
  - /docs/guide/part5-advanced/07-session-end-and-defrag.md: End-of-session and memory defrag
  # Part VI — Reference
  - /docs/guide/part6-reference/01-cc-version-history.md: CC version history (collapses 9 ship-logs)
  - /docs/guide/part6-reference/02-cli-flags-and-env.md: CLI flags, env vars
  - /docs/guide/part6-reference/03-hook-event-catalog.md: All 27 hook events
  - /docs/guide/part6-reference/04-skill-catalog.md: Skills index
  - /docs/guide/part6-reference/05-mcp-server-catalog.md: MCP servers index
  - /docs/guide/part6-reference/06-security-checklist.md: Security and hygiene checklist
